_comment: Publish-console 'App config' template (deployment defaults, becomes ENCLAVE_CONFIG via configCid). 'volumes' names the attested model volumes the platform attaches (the wasm-manager mounts each at /models/<name> in the guest - no paths here by design). The 'models' catalog is stated in FULL for all three volumes; the qwen2.5 entries duplicate the catalog embedded in the wasm (assets/app-config.json) so this config also works standalone. 122b geometry from the volume's GGUF header (qwen35moe) + tokenizer.json; needs >=~50% GPU share. Largest attached model serves as the default.

qwen3.5-122b-gguf.name: qwen3.5-122b-a10b
qwen3.5-122b-gguf.system_prompt: You are Qwen, a helpful AI assistant. Answer concisely and accurately.

qwen2.5-0.5b.name: qwen2.5-0.5b-instruct
qwen2.5-0.5b.system_prompt: You are Qwen, a helpful AI assistant. Answer concisely and accurately.

qwen2.5-0.5b-gguf.name: qwen2.5-0.5b-instruct-gguf
qwen2.5-0.5b-gguf.system_prompt: You are Qwen, a helpful AI assistant. Answer concisely and accurately.
